translations.en: a heavily scarred man with a look of agony on his face.
translations.zh: 滿身刀疤之男子，面色痛苦至極。

translations.en: "The pain, the pain... Will it never stop?"
"Too many... There were too many of them..."
"My head is pounding like a drum..."

translator_notes: Artegal 受傷戰士，只能在痛苦中呻吟，沒有可對話內容。
